description: India Book III,16: Letter from Khalaf b. Yiṣḥaq in Aden to Avraham Ibn Yiju in Mangalore, dated July-August 1148. The letter contains information about their commercial dealings and some personal matters, including greetings extended to Ibn Yiju's slave Bama. This is the letter that launched Amitav Ghosh on "The Slave of MS H. 6" and In an Antique Land. There is an image at the following link: https://www.nli.org.il/en/discover/manuscripts/hebrew-manuscripts/viewerpage?vid=MANUSCRIPTS#d=[[PNX_MANUSCRIPTS990024974800205171-1,FL5328444]].
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12 מעדן ל-Mangaluru. מוחזק בNLI.
